raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the central contribution as a calibration issue and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.5": "Suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but does not provide detailed suggestions for structural reorganization.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (the shift in focus from accuracy to calibration).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors by criticizing the original for presenting two incompatible 'central contributions'.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not explicitly traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.5": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the central contribution as a calibration issue and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.5: Suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but does not provide detailed suggestions for structural reorganization.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (the shift in focus from accuracy to calibration).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors by criticizing the original for presenting two incompatible 'central contributions'.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not explicitly traced.
